Empowering the digital transformation of your 3D measurement processes
You Dreamed It.
We Engineered It.
Join us on April 28
at 11:00 AM EDT
Register Now
InnovMetric supports the digital transformation of your 3D measurement processes. Contact us to initiate your digital journey.
Discover the story behind our mission, our people, and our passion for innovation
This video takes you beyond our solution—inside PolyWorks USA, an InnovMetric group company—to show how we're helping manufacturers around the world transform the way they work. From global partnerships to local impact, see how our commitment to empowering people drives our approach to delivering meaningful results.

InnovMetric
Empowering the digital transformation​ of your 3D measurement processes​
Empowering the digital transformation​ of your 3D measurement processes
About InnovMetric
InnovMetric is an independent software development company that empowers manufacturers of every size to digitally transform their 3D measurement processes. InnovMetric has revolutionized 3D metrology with the introduction of point-cloud-based dimensional inspection in 2000 and the concept of a universal 3D metrology software platform in 2006. Today, with over 24,000 customers in 100 countries, and the world’s largest industrial manufacturers having adopted its PolyWorks® solutions as their standard 3D metrology software platform, InnovMetric is focusing on creating next-generation digital data and process management technologies
Start watching
Your Trusted Partner Since 1994
The history of InnovMetric is one of technological innovations and passion for 3D measurement in which a talented software development firm headquartered in Quebec City, Canada, leverages its key partnerships with industrial manufacturing giants to become a multinational with a direct presence in 18 countries.
During the first 25 years of our business journey, we’ve pioneered point-cloud-based inspection, invented the concept of a universal 3D metrology software platform, and introduced the most user-friendly CMM sequencing workflow ever designed.
We’re now massively investing in creating the next-generation digital data and process management technologies that will bring 3D measurement data at the heart of your enterprise processes to significantly reduce time-to-market and fabrication costs.
24,000
customers in 100 countries
The world’s 100 largest manufacturers use PolyWorks
The PolyWorks smart digital ecosystem generates cost savings that quickly grow with the size of the enterprises. It’s no wonder that large organizations standardize on PolyWorks.
The 8 largest car manufacturers own 4,500 PolyWorks
licenses
The technologies we’ve perfected with large automotive groups since the beginning of PolyWorks|Inspector
in 2000 are available to customers from all industries.
The 8 largest car manufacturers own 5,500 PolyWorks
licenses
The technologies we’ve perfected with large automotive groups since the beginning of PolyWorks|Inspector
in 2000, are available to customers from all industries.
50% of our revenues are spent in R&D and technical support
Half of our revenues are directly returned in your pockets, thanks to our recurrent investments in technical innovations and our extensive technical support infrastructure.
